reason: The remediation requires editing the GRUB2 bootloader configuration ( /etc/grub.d/01_users ) and regenerating the grub.cfg. Errors can render the system unbootable or lock out privileged boot-time access, which is a high‑impact risk. Policy directs bootloader changes to be classified as too dangerous to remediate automatically.
estimated_impact: reboot required; filesystems affected; Bootloader configuration edit; Potential loss of boot-time access if syntax or export line is incorrect; Requires regeneration of grub.cfg and validation
